M1_raw_feature.verdict: Near null — raw matching shows no signal

M2_within_bin.verdict: NEAR NULL — no Arithmos beyond Megethos

key_finding: Within-bin random matching (M2) gives rho=0.033, indistinguishable from null (0.002). The EC->NF Arithmos transfer was entirely Megethos leakage. When you properly control for Megethos, no residual cross-domain structure remains in the phoneme NN matching.

what_this_means.phoneme_NN_transfer: DEAD as a precision metric. All reported rho values were Megethos leakage.
what_this_means.TT_Cross_bonds: UNTESTED by this fix. Bond dimensions use a different mechanism (coupling function, not NN matching). Need separate precision test.
what_this_means.discovery_of_correspondences: STILL VALID. The system correctly identifies that torsion and class number are arithmetic-type invariants. It cannot measure HOW they correspond beyond Megethos.

next_step: Test TT-Cross bond dimensions with F33-F37 integrated. If bonds survive within-bin controls, the tensor structure is real. If they collapse, the entire landscape was Megethos.
